title: ACT Manifest — auth block (runtime profile)
description: Shape of `manifest.auth` for the runtime delivery profile. PRD-106 owns this fragment; PRD-100 incorporates by reference. Anonymous public access is permitted by omitting `auth` entirely or supplying an empty object.

schemes.description: Ordered, most-preferred-first. 401 responses MUST emit one WWW-Authenticate header per scheme in this same order (PRD-106-R7).

oauth2.description: REQUIRED when `"oauth2"` appears in `schemes` (PRD-106-R9). Omit otherwise.

scopes_supported.description: Non-empty. The minimum scope `act.read` is reserved by PRD-106-R9 and SHOULD be present.

api_key.description: Present when `"api_key"` appears in `schemes`. PRD-106-R10 sets the default to `Authorization: Bearer <key>` to avoid header proliferation.

header.description: HTTP header name carrying the API key. Defaults to `Authorization`. A non-default value SHOULD be avoided.

format.description: `bearer` means the value is `Bearer <key>`; `raw` means the header value is the bare key.
